defs.𝑎: area index for small geographic domains
defs.𝑢_𝑎: area-specific random effect for area a
defs.𝜀_𝑎ℎ: household-specific idiosyncratic error for household h in area a
defs.𝑛_𝑎: number of sampled households in area a
defs.𝜎_𝑖: standard deviation of i-th normal mixture component
defs.𝜈_𝑗: mixing weight for j-th normal component
defs.𝜇_𝑖: mean of i-th normal mixture component
defs.𝑥_𝑎ℎ: covariate vector for household h in area a
defs.𝜎_𝜀: standard deviation of household idiosyncratic error
defs.𝑦_𝑎ℎ: log per-capita income for household h in area a
defs.𝐺_𝜀: cumulative distribution function of household error
defs.𝜎_1: standard deviation of first error component
defs.𝜎_2: standard deviation of second error component
defs.𝐹_𝑢: cumulative distribution function of area error
defs.I: index for the paper's first page
defs.𝐴: appendix or additional section of the paper
defs.𝑒_𝑎ℎ: household-specific error component in the nested error structure
defs.𝑒_𝑎,_1: first element of the household-specific error
defs.𝑒_𝑎,𝑛: nth element of the household-specific error
defs.𝑁: total number of households or observations
defs.𝑁_𝑎: number of households in area a
defs.𝑥_𝑎: vector of explanatory variables for area a
defs.𝑅_𝑟: root mean squared error used as precision measure
defs.𝐹_𝑒: finite normal mixture fitted to error distribution
defs.𝐵: parameter vector for the regression model
defs.𝐸_𝑢: expected value of the location error
defs.𝐹_𝑖: first component of the normal mixture
defs.𝐺_𝑗: second component of the normal mixture
defs.𝑤_𝑖𝑗𝑘: weight or indicator for observation i, j, k
